title: ggpaintr (development version)
text: L3 — every piece UI. Every piece ggpaintr’s public UI now exported builder: ptr_ui_header(), ptr_ui_controls(), ptr_ui_plot(), ptr_ui_error(), ptr_ui_code(), ptr_ui_code_toggle(), ptr_ui_assets(). Compose exactly pieces want, place anywhere layout, wire existing server API (ptr_server() / ptr_module_server()). bundled ptr_app() / ptr_module_ui() / ptr_outputs_ui() / ptr_controls_ui() paths reimplemented thin composites pieces — <body> DOM, behavior performance change. pieces deliberately bare (assets, .ptr-app wrapper); new ptr_ui_page() shell wraps Bootstrap page + single .ptr-app theme scope + (deduped) asset bundle one call, L3 user remember. Swap page builder page = (fluidPage default, also fixedPage/fillPage/bootstrapPage/basicPage); navbarPage bslib root use documented decomposition recipe. See vignette("ggpaintr-use-cases") § “L3 — every piece UI”. ptr_server() now accepts ptr_shared_server() bundle directly via shared_state =, mirroring ptr_module_server(). Wiring page-level ptr_shared_ui() panel single embedded custom-rendered plot longer requires spreading four bundle slots .... custom-renderer pattern (reading state$runtime() renderPlotly() / renderGirafe()) now documented L2 capability — ptr_server() ptr_module_server() return ptr_state, needs nothing beyond embedding.

title: ggpaintr (development version)
text: ptr_register_plot() / ptr_register_error() / ptr_register_code() longer exported. Post-rewrite ever ran inside ptr_server() (sole caller, via internal runtime setup) rendered nothing without , “compose outputs manually” use case advertised impossible. remain internal helpers; replacement needed (use L3 pieces + ptr_server(), read state$runtime() custom renderer). deprecation cycle — dev cycle’s surface, single pre-1.0 user. ggpaintr’s CSS/JS now ship deduped htmltools::htmlDependency() bundles. ggpaintr.css, code-window JS, ptr_set_class handler + stage CSS emitted two dependencies (ggpaintr, ggpaintr-layer) instead inline <style>/<script>/<link> tags. htmltools collapses single <head> injection matter many shells/pieces page nests, old window.__ptr_*_registered JS guards gone. Rendered <body> unchanged; <head> asset emission differs. htmltools moves Suggests Imports. hook signatures changed : build_ui(node, label = NULL, ...) value/source, build_ui(node, cols, label = NULL, selected = character(0), ...) consumer. id node$id (source companion id node$companion_id); separate id argument. resolve_expr(value, node, ...) returning NULL new “drop argument” signal (replacing ptr_missing_expr()). Distribution: package authors ship setup function calls ptr_define_placeholder_*() (caller-driven), auto-register .onLoad (drop-). Either pattern works; pick whether want registration visible call site. Multi-instance limitation: two ptr_module_server() instances Shiny app different implementations keyword. second registration overwrites first (cli::cli_warn notice). need divergent widgets per instance, prefix custom keywords package-specific tag (mypkg_pct rather pct). scoped per-instance registry override table future release. Test isolation: tests register custom placeholders restore state ptr_registry_clear() + ptr_register_builtins() (currently internal) run fresh R session. Extended curated empty-call cleanup list 14 ggplot2 names: annotation_custom(), annotation_map(), annotation_raster() (required args make zero-arg calls error stock ggplot2 — dropping prevents crash); aes(), aes_(), aes_q(), aes_string(), vars() (empty mapping helpers render-identical “absent” via inherit.aes); element_text(), element_line(), element_rect(), element_point(), element_polygon(), element_geom() (empty form inherits active theme element). means e.g. geom_point(aes(colour = var)) var missing now reduces + geom_point() (clean) instead + geom_point(aes()). element_blank() intentionally excluded — empty form meaningful “suppress” directive, -op. Replaced old name-prefix heuristic pruning empty calls. new rule : zero-argument call dropped iff bare function name curated ggplot2 cleanup list (theme(), labs(), xlab/ylab/ggtitle, facet_wrap/facet_grid/facet_null, xlim/ylim/lims, expand_limits, guides, annotate) new safe_to_remove argument ptr_app(), ptr_app_bslib(), ptr_app_components(), ptr_server(), ptr_module_server(), ptr_server_state(), ptr_complete_expr(), ptr_exec(). Empty calls whose name set (e.g. third-party helpers like pcp_theme(), pcp_arrange(), user-authored aes_pcp()) preserved default — absent set “removal safety unknown” signal. Pass safe_to_remove = c("pcp_theme") opt specific name cleanup pass. expr placeholder, user supplies expression, always wins cleanup pass: whatever user typed expr input honoured verbatim, even top-level name safe_to_remove. intent (“want ”) overrides curated list. geom_*() stat_*() layers kept empty regardless safe_to_remove, since inherit aesthetics ggplot(). geom_point(colour = var) var missing still renders geom_point(). Behavior change vs. prior implementation: user-authored literal + labs(), + theme(), + guides() calls now dropped (semantic change — ’re -ops stock ggplot2). previous build kept via “diff guard” removed favour cleaner curated-list rule.

title: ggpaintr 0.9.1
text: ptr_resolve_layer_data() ptr_ns_id() now exported full docs. Custom data-aware placeholders call helpers bind_ui() callback instead replicating source-symbol walk namespace-function dance. ?ptr_define_placeholder now documents bind_ui contract, contents placeholder context, meta$id namespacing rule. second runnable example demonstrates data-aware “numeric-columns-” placeholder using public helpers.

title: ggpaintr 0.9.0
text: ptr_gg_extra() — advanced helper embedded apps renderPlot({...}) block. Captures ggplot components (themes, scales, coords, …) added top ptr_extract_plot() stores new ptr_state$extras reactiveVal, default code binder (ptr_register_code()) appends generated-code pane. Extras suppressed automatically underlying runtime reports failure, stale extras prior successful draw never surface error state. See vignette("ggpaintr-extensibility"), Recipe 3. ptr_llm_primer(), ptr_llm_topic(), ptr_llm_topics(), ptr_llm_register() — ellmer-facing helpers expose bundled inst/llm/ primer topic files plain strings registered ellmer tools, coding assistants can fetch just--time ggpaintr guidance. See vignette("ggpaintr-llm"). upload placeholder now accepts .tsv, .xlsx, .xls, .json addition .csv .rds. JSON uploads must array records; nested objects flattened, nested arrays error . Excel JSON readers require new suggested packages readxl jsonlite. “show code” pane reflects format-appropriate reader (read.delim, readxl::read_excel, jsonlite::fromJSON).

title: ggpaintr 0.9.0
text: Removed Shiny app export feature: ptr_generate_shiny(), ptr_register_export(), download button, ids$export_button gone. Use public Shiny integration surface (ptr_server_state(), ptr_register_*(), ptr_input_ui(), ptr_output_ui(), ptr_app_bslib()) compose distribute custom apps. placeholder distribution parameters source_file, source_package, source_function, on_missing removed ptr_define_placeholder(). existed support exporter. Hook functions defined inline. last commit removals tagged v0-pre-export-removal.

title: ggpaintr 0.1.0
text: repositioned package around maintained ggpaintr workflow shortened API prefix: exported functions now use ptr_* prefix conciseness (previously ggpaintr_*) improved semantic clarity function names across public API (e.g., bind_* → register_*, *_value → extract_*) renamed copy_rules parameter/system ui_text throughout migrated error signaling base::stop() rlang::abort() added @examples exported functions clarified maintained public API boundary README pkgdown-facing docs beginner path stays centered wrapper, integration, export, placeholder, intentionally exported runtime helpers removed generated documentation topics package-internal helper functions internal implementation details longer presented part public community-facing surface updated ptr_generate_shiny() maintained public call path now ptr_generate_shiny(ptr_obj, output_file, ...) Note: ptr_generate_shiny() removed 0.9.0 — see breaking changes . archived legacy package implementation archive/legacy-package/ replaced legacy package docs, vignette, pkgdown content ggpaintr-first documentation added roxygen2-based package documentation active implementation prepared package structure R CMD check CRAN-oriented cleanup
